title: Product Marketing Specialist
required_skills: 3-5 years experience in content creation, content strategy, or product marketing
Content creation across multiple channels (digital, social, long-form)
Copywriting, social media marketing, or content marketing experience
Hands-on experience with Notion, WordPress, Canva, ActiveCampaign, Salesforce, SEO platforms
AI literacy and openness to AI tools
bonus_skills: Product marketing fundamentals with prior product team collaboration (strong advantage)
Familiarity with ad tech or programmatic advertising
Spanish or Portuguese language skills (LATAM focus)
matched_skills: Go-to-market strategy support (partial match to GTM execution requirement)
C-level data storytelling (partial match to communication and storytelling requirement)
Cross-functional team coordination (matches collaboration with product/sales/growth teams)
Campaign performance optimisation (partial match to performance-driven content marketing)
missing_skills: Content strategy (blogs, whitepapers, case studies, thought leadership)
Ad tech or programmatic advertising knowledge
Hands-on tools: Notion, WordPress, Canva, ActiveCampaign, Salesforce, SEO platforms
core_responsibilities: Define and execute go-to-market (GTM) strategies including product positioning, messaging, and launch planning
Create marketing and sales enablement materials to drive product adoption and revenue growth
Develop and manage content strategy across blogs, whitepapers, case studies, social media, and thought leadership
Drive organic inbound growth through SEO-optimized content and performance-focused content marketing
Act as community voice across ad tech and publisher industry forums, newsletters, and social channels
Collaborate with product, sales, and growth teams to align messaging and support overall GTM execution
recommended_emphasis: Highlight Go-to-Market strategy experience from Minth Group and HSBC (market intelligence, competitive analysis feeding GTM decisions)
Emphasize cross-functional collaboration with product and sales teams in prior roles
Position data storytelling skills as transferable to content strategy and messaging work
Showcase any content creation, writing, or communication deliverables (reports, executive decks, dashboards) as evidence of storytelling ability
Mention EMEA/APAC multi-market coverage as relevant to global product marketing scope

company_info.size_raw: No company size information found in JD text. Role posted by Jobgether on behalf of unnamed partner company.
